description: Pipeline configuration — tiered model routing and per-stage parameters. Loaded by utils/config.py at runtime.

entity_extraction.rationale: Pure classification + span extraction. No complex reasoning required; Haiku 4.5 is sufficient and ~12x cheaper.

entity_resolution.rationale: Requires financial-domain knowledge for alias grouping and canonical selection. Sonnet 4.5 balances cost and reasoning quality.

entity_sentiment_scoring.rationale: Per-entity sentiment requires nuanced language understanding + evidence citation. Sonnet 4.5 is the right balance.

qa_and_conflict_detection.rationale: Rule-like contradiction detection over structured summaries. Haiku 4.5 handles this cleanly.

report_generation.rationale: Multi-audience narrative synthesis. Sonnet 4.5 produces clean grounded prose; Haiku tends to over-abbreviate.

pipeline.budget_note: Hard cap for a single run. BudgetExceededError is raised after any call that pushes total spend above this value. Set to null to disable. Increase for larger source sets.
